title: BBQ Metal Skewers Stainless Steel 20 PCS 7.87"/20cm Food-Grade Kebab Turkey Lacers QQ CAT Reusable Skewers for Air Fryer, Metal Skewer for Oven Halloween Christmas Party Turkey
features: 🍖【HIGH QUALITY】Unlike many other metal skewers on Amazon, QQ CAT metal kebab skewers are made from high quality Type 440 STAINLESS STEEL, a more hardenable high-carbon chromium steel. Which offers good corrosion resistance along with abrasion resistance. All edges around the metal kebab are polished so that the kebab can be used safely.Unlike traditional bamboo skewers wooden sticks, they are reusable.

🍖【REUSABLE】Unlike wooden skewer sticks or bamboo skewers, metal skewers kebab sticks are reusable. These meat skewers for grilling do not break or burn and are environmentally friendly. The metal skewers for oven can be used regularly. The length is long enough to hold a large amount of food. 20 quantity is enough for a small picnic, or you can share it with your neighbors and friends.7.87inch long x1.8mm thick.

🍖【PERFECT USE】QQ CAT metal kebab skewers can be used in oven, kebab machine and bbq to cook tasty food like turkish shish kebabs, adana kebabs, kofte, jacket potato, marshmallows, vegetables and fruits, also used as cake tester skewer, baked potato spike.Suitable for BBQ party, cocktail party, christmas party, birthday party, wedding, grill, fruit grill, cheese, chocolate fountain and many more other occasions.Enjoy barbecue time with family and friends.

🍖【EASY TO CLEAN】 Our kebab skewers metal surface is smooth so that grilled food residue won’t stick onto the stainless steel skewers. After use, wash these metal skewers for grilling in warm water in time, hand wash with mild detergent and wipe dry or air dry. Reusable, unlike wooden and bamboo sticks.

🍖【Attentive Service】NOTE: Please use the barbecue needle correctly because the tip is very sharp and there is a risk of piercing your hands during the process of skewing the meat. Please wear safety gloves to prevent injury to your hands during use. If you have any questions about our products or any questions about our services, please contact us and we will provide you with a satisfactory solution.
description: Product Description These Metal Barbecue Skewers Makes It Easy To Grilling Anything You Want. QQ CAT grilling skewers are made of robust stainless steel. This means they can take the heat, wash up really easily, and can be used again and again! You can use them to grill up all sorts of savoury snacks. They are a must-have for barbecue season (Brazilian-style barbecued steak anyone), and also work well under grills and on electric griddles and hot plates. NOTE : Stainless steel does not mean that it will not corrode and rust, they have good corrosion resistance, so correct maintenance is required to increase their service life. Immediately after use, wash these grilled metal skewers with lukewarm water, hand wash with mild detergent and wipe dry or air dry for storage!! ONE-PIECE DESIGN, ERGONOMIC HANDLE The handle provides max comfort for you, making it easy to maneuver the kabobs. One-piece kabob skewers are easy to grab when you are pulling them off the grill. It is also easy to grip with tongs. The handle won't get hot, and allows for easier hanging. STAINLESS STEEL, EASY CLEANING, REUSABLE The kabob skewers are made of food grade stainless steel that won’t get rusted nor corroded after long term use. Stainless steel bbq sticks are heat resistant so there is no soaking necessary nor burning issue. These strong kebab skewer will not break, bend or twist. The barbecue skewers surface is smooth that food residue won’t get stuck onto the blade. Metal kabab skewers is easy to clean by hand. The kebab skewers are also dishwasher safe. You can use them time and time again. The bbq skewers will be a money saver. ANGLED TIP, EASY PIERCING The kebab skewers have nice angled tip which makes it easy to slip kabobs on skewers without having to force them on. So the skewered hole won’t be too big and the skewered food won’t get splintered. But it is not too sharp and won’t cause finger injury. BBQ SKEWERS DESIGNED FOR THE OVEN The design of the hook can easily hang the barbecue skewers on the grill, and the suitable length enables the skewers to be placed in the oven upright to bake food. Offers another way to grill. Notes: Please be careful when handling these bbq skewers. You'd better wear a pair of gloves as they will get hot. Please use the barbecue needle correctly. Because the tip of the pen is very sharp, there is a risk of piercing your hands during the process of skewing the meat. Please wear safety gloves to prevent injury to your hands during use.
